title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Book Week Event
questions.text: Local author Sara Bell will talk about creating mystery stories on Wednesday. Students who have already read one of her books may join a small writing workshop afterwards. Bring your own notebook.
questions.question: Who can attend the writing workshop?

options.B: Students familiar with Sara Bell’s work.
options.A: Students who bring a mystery book.
options.C: Anyone who wants to meet a local author.

questions.explanation: The workshop is for students who have already read one of her books.

questions.heading: Message from Anna to Rob
questions.text: Rob, I’m still coming to your house this afternoon, but I need to stop at the post office first. Don’t start the science model without me — I’ve got the instructions in my bag. Anna
questions.question: Why is Anna texting Rob?

options.C: To tell him to wait before beginning their work.
options.A: To say she cannot come to his house.
options.B: To ask him to collect something for her.

questions.explanation: Anna tells Rob not to start because she has the instructions.

questions.heading: Community Centre
questions.text: The upstairs rooms are closed while new windows are fitted. Yoga and art classes will meet downstairs this week. Please check the board near the entrance before going to your usual room.
questions.question: What should people do this week?

options.A: Look for information about temporary room changes.
options.B: Use the upstairs rooms only for quiet classes.
options.C: Enter the centre through a different door.

questions.explanation: Classes are meeting downstairs, and people should check the board.

questions.heading: From: Yasmin / Subject: Party music
questions.text: I’ve made a playlist for the party, but it’s mostly dance music. Could you add some quieter songs too? We’ll need something playing while people arrive and while we’re eating.
questions.question: What does Yasmin want?

options.B: A wider choice of music for different moments.
options.A: Someone to remove dance music from the playlist.
options.C: Advice about where to hold the party.

questions.explanation: Yasmin asks for quieter songs as well as dance music.

questions.heading: Photography Studio
questions.text: Passport photos are available without an appointment from 10 to 3. For family portraits, please book at least two days in advance. Payment is made after you choose the pictures you want.
questions.question: What does the notice explain?

options.C: Some types of photograph need to be arranged earlier.
options.A: Customers must pay before seeing their pictures.
options.B: Passport photos are only taken with appointments.

questions.explanation: Family portraits must be booked at least two days in advance.
